creator: agh@riseup.net
text:
(In reply to Nuno Teixeira from comment #1)
Hello, Nuno

I am unable to provide a patch at this time. I am well and truly up shit-creek with a failed GEOM RAID, attempts to restore, or recover data, is my priority for the foreseeable future. Unfortunately I have no idea how long it will take to acquire spare parts, and recover the data.

Sorry for the incapacity as ${MAINTAINER}, to the Project, and community.
